title: FDIC Institution Location
description: A branch office or location record for an FDIC-insured financial institution.

CERT.description: FDIC certificate number of the parent institution.

NAME.description: Name of the institution associated with this location.

UNINUM.description: Unique numeric identifier for the branch office.

OFFNUM.description: Office number assigned to this branch location.

SERVTYPE.description: Service type code indicating the type of office (e.g., 11 = full-service brick and mortar).

CITY.description: City where the branch is located.

STNAME.description: Full state name where the branch is located.

STALP.description: Two-letter state abbreviation where the branch is located.

ZIP.description: ZIP code of the branch location.

COUNTY.description: County where the branch is located.

RUNDATE.description: Date as of which the branch data was current.
